promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote this archive package reduction into active A2 control memory, and do not let archive-side hybrid outputs outrank the source-bearing Leviathan family or active schema authority.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected because the source-bearing Leviathan family had just received its own direct child reduction, leaving the archive-side hybrid package as the next real unresolved Leviathan sibling.

selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The new source-bearing Leviathan child was used to keep this archive package below the original family, the megaboot child was used to keep hybrid mixed-authority packaging legible, and batch05 was used as a cleaner single-family archive sibling for packaging contrast.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred until this more hybrid and duplication-heavy archive sibling had its own direct child reduction.
Deferred because the active queue was already in the Leviathan archive sibling lane and this package still had no direct A2-mid child.
Deferred because the archive Leviathan package offered a tighter package-authority and stage-2-boundary reduction target.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent package batch already isolates the hybrid output container, duplicated naming families, schema-gate weakness, mapping-lock ancestry, and contradiction maps. This bounded reduction did not require reopening archive member text beyond the parent artifacts.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the package's strongest reusable archive packets: source hierarchy, duplication drift, output-only and registry drift discipline, stub-schema stage-2 demotion, mapping-lock lineage, and contradiction lineage.
They remain package-linked, contradiction-preserving, and explicitly below both the source-bearing Leviathan family and active schema or control authority.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain authority inflation, corroboration overread, self-sufficient bundle overclaim, stage-2 PASS overread, meta-free lock promotion, or worldview promotion rather than clean A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them explicitly, but not to promote them into active law.
